docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,575.00 FILED BY HILL, VANDOR AS TO DEFENDANT DELUNG, JASMINE RAE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-17-2026 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-15-2026, PERSONAL SERVICE, SERVICE FEE: $76.00 AS TO DEFENDANT DELUNG, JASMINE RAE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-17-2026 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUN-08-2026 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF VANDOR HILL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JASMINE RAE DELUNG IS PRESENT. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR A PAYMENT OF $1240.74 TO THE PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE NEXT HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOHN TRUE; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER TO CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF VANDOR HILL. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT JASMINE RAE DELUNG. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MURLENE J RANDLE; CLERK: N.WEBB. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION
